semantic.role: Infrastructure barrel module re-exporting the public API of the manifest subsystem.
responsibilities: Expose the Manifest type/class and hasManifestBaseline function as the stable public interface for manifest operations.
Provide a single import point for consumers to access manifest capabilities without depending on deeper implementation modules.
outOfScope: Manifest internals, serialization, validation, or state management logic.
Any symbols not re-exported through this file.
invariants: All re-exports originate from the public facade submodule (./manifest/facade.js).
The public surface is limited to the two explicitly re-exported symbols.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain a clean, documented public API surface for the manifest infrastructure layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: The file was modified as part of the v1.0.0 release, but the semantic role remains unchanged — it still serves as the barrel re-export for the manifest facade.

publicSurface.description: Represents the full manifest entity, including metadata and state. Consumed by services and tasks that need read or write access to the project manifest.
Checks whether a manifest baseline exists for the current project context. Used by initialization and sync logic to decide whether to create or update the manifest.
